specs.title: at-matrix
specs.summary: This matrix records assistive-technology (AT) test results for the representative component set defined in `at-methodology.md`. Testing was performed manually; stacks not available in the current environment are marked `not tested`. Results are point-in-time — re-run when components change.

specs.title: at-methodology
specs.summary: This document defines cascade's assistive-technology (AT) testing methodology.

specs.title: chart-palette
specs.summary: The `--cascade-chart-1..8` tokens are grounded in the **Okabe-Ito 8-color palette**, the de-facto standard for scientific figures requiring color vision deficiency (CVD) safety.

specs.title: Color Usage
specs.summary: cascade uses a three-level token system for color. AI agents and component authors must use semantic tokens, never primitive color values.

specs.title: Content Tone
specs.summary: cascade components with user-visible chrome text (labels, aria strings, empty states) follow these voice guidelines.

specs.title: Before/After Context Impact Demo
specs.summary: Reproducible comparison: each prompt run twice.

specs.title: Decision Hierarchy
specs.summary: When guidance conflicts, resolve it in this order:

specs.title: legal-mapping
specs.summary: Cascade targets WCAG 2.2 AA conformance at the component level. All three major accessibility frameworks — EAA, EN 301 549, and US Section 508 — reference WCAG as their technical standard.

specs.title: perf-methodology
specs.summary: This document diagnoses the current state of the per-component incremental bundle matrix before any fixes land (T3-T2 and later). Read `apps/bench/METHODOLOGY.md` for the overall benchmark methodology; this doc focuses specifically on the incremental matrix and the two known defects that corrupt its output.

specs.title: Spacing
specs.summary: cascade uses a fixed spacing scale defined as `--cascade-space-*` tokens. All spacing in components must reference these tokens rather than hard-coded pixel values.

specs.title: t5-deferral
specs.summary: **Status:** Deferred within v13 **Decision date:** 2026-06-13 **Tranche:** T5 (CSS-native progressive enhancement)

specs.title: wcag-2.2
specs.summary: Three criteria added in WCAG 2.2 require explicit cascade handling. This document records the implementation approach and verification status for each.
